title: THE TWIDDLERS - 8 Christmas Wind Up Toys, Stocking Fillers Assorted Xmas Designs - Snowman, Santa, Reindeer, Christmas Party Gift Bag Filler for Kids, 8cm x 5cm
features: 🎅Adorable Designs: These 8 cute little wind-up toys come in a variety of fun characters, including Santa, reindeer, snowmen, penguins, and more!

🎅Great Christmas Party Bag Fillers for Kids: Kids will love these toys and have hours of fun getting them to race each other, whether its as a toddler stocking filler or as Christmas table favours for kids.

🎅Perfect Stocking Fillers: These miniature wind-up toys are perfect as small stocking fillers, gifts for advent calendars and christmas party bag fillers, especially for eager little hands that can't wait until Xmas day to open something!

🎅Quality and Variety: Crafted with attention to detail, these assorted advent calendar fillers in Xmas designs promise durability and an array of delightful characters, making every wind-up a surprise - perfect as christmas eve box fillers or kids stocking fillers.
🎅Satisfaction Guaranteed: We offer a 100% one-year warranty on all of our mini gifts for christmas crackers. If you have any queries about a product or assembly, please don’t hesitate to contact us!
description: Product Description Bundles of Fun From exciting lucky dips and wind-up toys to mini mazes and inflatable reindeer ring toss, we’ve got bundles of fun for the whole family to enjoy this festive period.
